Portable Water Cantee: The sports water bottle 2L has a portable handle for easy carrying and can be used as a mobile phone holder. The other 2 have a carrying cord. Wide mouth design is convenient for ice cubes, fruits and easy to clean.
100% Leak-proof: Plastic water bottle is designed with a safety lock, a key lock/open, convenient and safe, to ensure that the drinking bottle can be 360 ° leak-proof.

Premium Service: A wide range of colours and capacities to choose from, ideal gift for your loved ones to help them stay hydrated and healthy! If there is any problem during use, please feel free to contact us!
